title: Trump Is Making the 250th Small
description: The State Fair rally was an empty celebration of a man instead of a country.
author: Tom Nichols

title: Trump’s Other Paint Job
description: Before he botched the Reflecting Pool, the president wanted the border wall black.
author: Nick Miroff

title: The Whiplash of Trump’s Iran Capitulation
description: America’s foreign policy is about one man and little else.
author: Tom Nichols

title: Trump’s No-Limits Presidency
description: Most presidents become chastened about their power over time. Trump is doing the opposite.
author: David A. Graham

title: Trump Has a Bill Pulte Problem
description: The acting director of national intelligence appears to be legally ineligible for the job.
author: Shane HarrisandVivian Salama

title: Don’t Overestimate the Pink Tide
description: Democratic socialists aren’t taking over America.
author: Adam Serwer

title: New York’s Warning for Hakeem Jeffries and Chuck Schumer
description: They aren’t the dominant force in their hometown.
author: Russell Berman

title: Vanilla Ice Knows When America Was Great
description: To celebrate the country’s 250th birthday, the rapper wants to transport us to another decade.
author: Spencer Kornhaber

title: Photos: Building the World’s Largest Fusion Reactor
description: The International Thermonuclear Experimental Reactor (ITER) is one of the largest and most expensive science projects in history. Thirty-five nations are working together to build a massive magnetic f
author: Alan Taylor

title: Did Trump Surrender to Iran?
description: Inside the Trump-Iran negotiations, with Vivian Salama. Plus: Why do people no longer care about climate change? AndBel Cantoby Ann Patchett.
author: David Frum

title: Would Claude Refuse an Illegal Military Order?
description: The AI chatbot told me that it has misgivings about its role in modern warfare.
author: Shane Harris

title: AtlanticTrivia: Wine
description: Test your knowledge—and read our stories for a little extra help.
author: Drew Goins

title: Burnham Is Britain’s Last Chance Before Farage
description: If he becomes prime minister, he has three years to fix the country.
author: Idrees Kahloon

title: War and Consequences
description: The damage will not be undone when the Trump administration is gone.
author: Eliot A. Cohen

title: The AI Super PACs Trying to Influence the Midterms
description: The elections will be a test for the industry’s ability to translate money into political power.
author: Will Gottsegen

title: Another Top General Is Out at the Pentagon
description: C. D. Donahue, the last American soldier to leave Afghanistan, is the latest in a long line of military departures.
author: Nancy A. YoussefandMissy Ryan

title: America’s Greatest Food Export
description: Ranch dressing has become, deservedly or not, a face of the nation during the World Cup.
author: Ellen Cushing

title: Is It Warm Out There?
description: The planet is getting hotter. But America’s conversation about it has chilled.
author: Joshua Partlow
